hb093ced4gaa32g41a3g929fg2e89647fac6a: ((*King of Kings, I am. Let this place be sacred: Circle Glut takes root!*))
hb2ea27ebgbc12g48bdg8b8eg445cf2b01d13: ((*My spawn will rise, and sing of your might. You will be called King-Bringer!*))
hc05a2f47g9345g4cd0g90c5g7029eb4a1934: ((*Take my gift of song. Cry it low or loud - but cry it proud, King-Bringer! So it is certain, and so you are known!*))
h4183d63dg3733g47b7g8e63g0d33c61acde8: *Victorious song consumes the grotto; a rhythmic chant pulses just beneath.*
h747f8522gb64ag4dfdg8852gcda973329c62: *You know it for what it is: a chant of war. Glut's reign would not be one of peace - but terror.*
h233454e0g95eag4b03g9d46gca8a7818ada7: ((*Eliminate Spaw. The circle must pay for its failures!*))
h21ce706dg1a9dg482eg834bgfa453e2a0948: Spaw is destroyed - the circle is no more.
h46896881g2ba2g4f68g8116g6978f7ad5ff6: ((*Can it be? Take me to the corpse. I must lay eyes on it.*))
h94f14e5dg52acg435cg9c57g5c87dd9e957c: *You consider your kin, dead by your hand.*
h3bdc460fg5559g4896g8cc7ga2669d06c670: ((*The tumour is excised. The duergar are dead.*))
h854ccd74gf0b0g4681gab7fg5839ff1e2640: ((*The tumour is excised. The duergar are dead.*))
hde00fda5gdc59g41c9gb4ddg5d695d15043c: ((*Here, I break ground. From the dark will a mighty circle rise. My song will fill the grotto!*))
he6d383c7gab2fg4a6aga9bdgee2fe3adbb6e: ((*Kin-killer - the grotto may sustain but one sovereign. In the Age of Glut...*))
hf4371384g8173g417fg8ae4g70cb48857d28: ((*Death-doer - the grotto may sustain but one sovereign. In the Age of Glut...*))
heb1f08deg3b6cg45f0g8317g4b4a960be5ee: ((*...there may be no Spaw. Eliminate the other sovereign.*))
h85316ea4g600bg4c59g93e4g35b6ae286b55: You would turn on Sovereign Spaw so easily?
h3eca134dg2376g4112gbb60ge48121a5dc3b: ((*My circle long suffered while the duergar flourished.*))
h51ecdfbdg2f8fg4115g95f6g5202681a130c: ((*I sang to Spaw for help. Yet it cowered in the grotto and let my people be slaughtered.*))
hfba8364fg9d9bg4291g9c47g9d5bca723598: ((*Choose, smooth-mind. Help me grow a mighty circle and reap the reward...*))
ha621f7d5g8aebg4776gac2bgfc229d6c3ed2: ((*...or protect the precious poltroon as it waits for the Circle of Glut to devour it whole.*))
hd4686445gbf39g4a9fg8fc9gdb5364c54085: ((*A tune of division, yours forever to sing.*))
hfbe1b9dfga58bg44f0gad3dgbce9bb131f3b: ((*Keep your allies steady, and your foes fearful. Melodies of peace, even in war.*))
hd5dfdd6eg861cg4465gbdd6g5b4bca515b92: ((*A tune of division, yours to sing - three scrolls in all.*))
h1b550438g07c3g4691g91fdgc2c9e340040a: Why not. Spaw's time is done.
h44c32757g4d05g4b01g9214gaf1e4eedb58e: Spaw is already dead - the circle is no more.
h7b1f1bc2g9753g41ffg8fa0g17bdae095bd7: I'll have no part of this.
h6c380c45g6414g4de3ga7f4g279cb44a7d73: ((*It is my right. It is my right!*))
ha1456539g0a93g40b5g80a3g121ffdf33d28: *Its delicate harmonies turn to scrapes and scratches.*
hd7dd4238ge012g45f9gab6bg06bffeef9938: If you're so eager for blood, Glut, then let me give it to you.
h646765cdgf985g41cagae5eg75e8aa5e4f2a: ((*The rot still spreads. Let me join you, so I may cleanse it.*))
h4249062fgfaafg4a5dg91d0g6402336bc2bb: ((*It is time. We take death to the duergar.*))
hdb1b8cd6gd192g4f99ga6cfg4d5d3c41a44e: ((*Come to the circle. I will await there.*))
hb247095egd63cg43d8gb8d5g00caf42f304f: It's already done - the duergar are dead.
he9c9ba11g50cag43d4g8a39gb0c4cd48d178: ((*I must see for myself. Lead me to the rot. I wish to see it fester.*))
h7abcc4e6g6058g4cf2g9a5fgaca5914ac3c9: ((*I grow among them. Yet I am not of them.*))
h9e668a0dg5e72g483fgaa68g26531253029d: ((*Toe-prancer. Sovereign Spaw has sung your fate.*))
hc65d1830gc01eg4f1fg8f85gdbfe9a1d6bd7: ((*You will cleanse the duergar rot. I will join you.*))
hed2f0e58gdcfdg4371gb7aegadd46941a77b: ((*Flesh-walker, tongue-talker. You look like the rot, yet your presence soothes me.*))
h15b5bf58g6f9fg441fgb6d9g317987f991e6: ((*Far you've come. Reach into memory - tell me of home.*))
h04194e6dg228fg4fabgbed1g38c60936b6c4: ((*Reach into memory. Tell me of home.*))
h3677b83fg7bdag41edgbe22g5e2cb4222919: My home is wherever I travel.
h18aab4c7gb740g456bg8c3cg669addabf2ed: Fill your heart with memories of your most treasured places.
ha015ab5fg61e6g4020gb59cgb82c100ed41c: Envision the banks of the Chionthar: green and fertile.
h357cdcd5gfe4ag4e09g9631g18d5c95db60c: *It cringes in response to your sunny vision - and reveals its own home: a humid cove filled with decaying myconid corpses.*
h6143f9f7g7156g4e19g8325g93dc27b93576: ((*Duergar destroyed my people. I am a sovereign with no circle.*))
hedf7c207gfd5cg4755ga703gc6db1ea9ffd3: ((*But I have heard the song. You mean to cleanse the duergar rot. I mean to join you.*))
h70883a1fgcc2fg4642g8edegc9e71b53cec3: It will be dangerous. You appear ill-equipped.
h30819ba2gcfc2g4c75gbef4g63c8d3ca3eda: Are you sure? It's going to be dangerous.
hdf2b76a1g0a71g4583gbcafg607f6db059c7: ((*I am the danger, and I am the cure. They erased my people; I will erase theirs.*))
h070ec167gd77cg42b4gb3dbg5f4f2e482ab9: Join me? That depends - can you make yourself useful?
h22fcda12g4f9cg4147gba45g3b2b2ae5fda4: ((*In death, your foe becomes your ally. I will raise it; you may command it.*))
h73054769g7cf8g40aagbd5cgd9e4d9daf221: What threat do you pose to duergar?
h4f427af1g77a5g42abg8d33g8aaa4ffac912: Join me. An enemy of the duergar is a friend to me.
h7db37577g44f1g4543ga7bfg8b061c0e83b6: Very well - you may join me.
h08bc2245g698eg44fdg943fg0d13b71bc5f8: ((*Remain in the Underdark, and I will follow. We cleanse the rot together.*))
h1581a053g05b2g49ceg90c1g2285688fee57: I'm not travelling with some overgrown mushroom.
he3e35d7bg8615g4034g9924ge1e038ca45c5: ((*A sovereign's fate is to reign. When the day comes, you will grovel.*))
h313ac97eg112dg460dg9bc2gdf66298a0ecc: ((*I do not belong here; I am not welcomed here.*))
h33ff19f4gfdf6g477ag8716ga50d45d5b9a1: Imagine the bustle of the city's marketplace: The Wide.
h7cf88b42g64beg4be7ga69bg3dfd3fc694a3: *The creature cringes, overwhelmed by the throngs - and reveals its own home: a humid cove filled with decaying myconid corpses.*
hfd55c9eaga96fg4acfg8510g0643d969fa81: Imagine Crèche K'liir - rocky and cold - orbiting Toril with the Tears of Selûne.
h1388ab31gca5bg4029ga5dag0ad48159af6f: *It shivers, overwhelmed by alien sights, and reveals its own home: a humid cove filled with decaying myconid corpses.*
h88ccc375g73f7g4b16gadb0gf2eec4fc5dd7: Think back to your father's opulent estate.
h935d6983g0f2bg4bccgb1f7g2b0cddc95d15: *It reveals its own home in reply: a humid cove filled with decaying myconid corpses.*
h074fa6c0g2a4fg44d5gb716gddbfa79bd9cc: Turn your mind to the damp floor of your master's crypt.
h8030149eg0a0fg4ca0gbbdcg742ad7d6a03b: *It shivers in response to the deathly tomb and reveals its own home: a humid cove filled with decaying myconid corpses.*
hdc152168gcf99g4877g9603gd637c026f703: Think of the cloister. Your sisters. The teachings. The pain.
h3c8acf1ag1525g4d46gb181gbc9b3fdb1f27: *It shivers in resonance with your remembered pain and reveals its own: a humid cove filled with decaying myconid corpses.*
hed26db0dg3962g4eddga989g4d3c1d51bbb9: Recall the Rashemi High Places - forests thick and silent, where only spirits speak.
h1e9d0aa8g3cd8g432bga96cg34f76bc44a71: *It shivers in understanding. A vision of its own home flickers into your mind: a humid cove filled with decaying myconid corpses.*
h06f64457g38d6g47b2g8bb6ga6fcd123f753: Imagine the battlefields of Avernus. Hell had been your home for too long.
h9c735563gd44dg4e68g9dc0g3cedf5530a5f: I live at the edges. Wherever there's solitude, there's danger - but peace, too.
h4d5359cfg30c3g44e6g8a70g038f551c9992: The Astral citadel of Tu'narath, at the court of Queen Vlaakith. That is my place.
hdcfd00d2gd1e7g41e5g8c06g0474c80759ef: *It shivers and reveals its own home in reply: a humid cove filled with decaying myconid corpses.*
h0d95ad1ag18a6g4bd5gb54fgf14fbb70b2fb: Wherever there's love, light and laughter. A warm hearth doesn't hurt, either.
h7749aea5g0f2fg4fe8ga0e8g10c688b08005: A tricky concept - but home is wherever you can make it. Family, too.
haf98df02gd96cg4f60g8745gb2747beb46a5: Visualise the forests of Faerûn. Your home lies there, in the dappled light between trees.
h8f90b601g4837g460fg8032g2553508fdbcc: Recall the majesty of the northern ranges, untamed and unforgiving.
h88afb3b0g5adfg4148g92bcgc846ba1bc474: Recall the shadowed grottos and winding tunnels of the Great Rift.
hadaf666eg2a9fg4828g9f2dg646ff7331e27: Envision vast Menzoberranzan, the city awash in Narbondel's heat-glow.
h5b11f20fg2931g42ebg937dg8acea253c9cb: ((*Flesh-walker, tongue-talker. You hail from the Dark - yet far you've come.*))
